---
title: "Análisis Exploratorio"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: custom.scss
    scrolling: false
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: house
        href: index.qmd
        aria-label: Inicio
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from IPython.display import display

# ── Paleta ───────────────────────────────────
C_DEEP  = "#03045E"
C_MID   = "#0077B6"
C_LIGHT = "#00B4D8"
C_FOAM  = "#90E0EF"
C_MIST  = "#CAF0F8"
C_CORAL = "#F4A261"
C_TEAL  = "#2A9D8F"

# ── Fondo transparente para gráficos (encajan con el tema oscuro) ──
_bg = dict(
    plot_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font_color="#cce8f4",
)

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
#  CARGA DE DATOS
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════

np.random.seed(42)

ballenas = pd.read_csv('../datos/ballenas/ballenas.csv').iloc[:28]
ballenas.columns = ['año', 'poblacion registrada']
ballenas['poblacion registrada'] = ballenas['poblacion registrada'].str.replace(',', '').astype(float)
ballenas['año'] = pd.to_numeric(ballenas['año'])

pelicanos = pd.read_csv('../datos/pelicanos/pelicanos.csv').iloc[:22, :2]
pelicanos.columns = ['año', 'cantidad_nidos_pelicanos']
pelicanos['año'] = pelicanos['año'].astype(str)

produccion_pesquera = pd.read_csv(
    '../datos/produccion_pesquera/produccion_pesquera.csv',
    header=None, names=['año', 'toneladas_pescadas']
)
produccion_pesquera['toneladas_pescadas'] = produccion_pesquera['toneladas_pescadas'].str.replace(',', '').astype(float)
produccion_pesquera['año'] = produccion_pesquera['año'].astype(float)

embarcaciones = pd.read_csv('../datos/embarcaciones/total_embarcaciones.csv').iloc[:36]
embarcaciones['total_embarcaciones'] = embarcaciones['total_embarcaciones'].str.replace(',', '').astype(float)
embarcaciones['año'] = pd.to_numeric(embarcaciones['año'])

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
#  FRANJAS EL NIÑO (compartidas entre figuras)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════

el_nino_periods = [
    (2002, 2003), (2004, 2005), (2006, 2007),
    (2009, 2010), (2014, 2016), (2018, 2019)
]

shapes_nino = [
    dict(
        type="rect", x0=s, x1=e, y0=0, y1=1,
        xref="x", yref="paper",
        fillcolor="rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.15)",
        line_width=0, layer="below"
    )
    for s, e in el_nino_periods
]

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
#  FUNCIONES DE FIGURAS
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════

def crear_fig_ballenas(df):
    fig = go.Figure()

    # Leyenda El Niño
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=[None], y=[None], mode='markers',
        marker=dict(symbol="square", size=15, color="rgba(244,162,97,0.3)"),
        name='Fenómeno de El Niño (Calentamiento)', showlegend=True
    ))

    # Serie principal
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=df['año'], y=df['poblacion registrada'],
        mode='lines+markers', name='Avistamientos',
        line=dict(color=C_MID, width=3, shape='spline'),
        marker=dict(size=8, color=C_DEEP, symbol='circle'),
        fill='tozeroy', fillcolor='rgba(0,180,216,0.15)',
        hovertemplate="<b>Año:</b> %{x}<br><b>Individuos:</b> %{y:,.0f}<extra></extra>"
    ))

    fig.add_annotation(x=2012, y=3070, text="<b>Máximo histórico</b>",
        showarrow=True, arrowhead=2, ax=0, ay=-40,
        font=dict(color=C_TEAL, size=12))
    fig.add_annotation(x=2020, y=980, text="<b>Mínimo histórico</b>",
        showarrow=True, arrowhead=2, ax=0, ay=30,
        font=dict(color="#C62828", size=12))

    fig.update_layout(
        **_bg,
        shapes=shapes_nino,
        title=dict(
            text="<b>Monitoreo de Ballenas en Baja California</b>"
                 "<br><span style='font-size:13px;color:#7ab4cc;'>"
                 "El impacto de la temperatura oceánica en la migración</span>",
            y=0.96, x=0.02, xanchor='left', yanchor='top'
        ),
        xaxis_title="Temporada (Año)",
        yaxis_title="Individuos Registrados",
        hovermode="x unified",
        legend=dict(orientation="h", y=1.05, yanchor="bottom", x=1, xanchor="right"),
        margin=dict(l=60, r=30, t=100, b=60),
        height=420
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(tickformat=".0f", tickangle=0, dtick=4, showgrid=False,
                     color="#7ab4cc", linecolor="rgba(93,214,240,0.2)")
    fig.update_yaxes(showgrid=True, gridcolor='rgba(93,214,240,0.12)',
                     tickformat=",", color="#7ab4cc")
    return fig


def crear_fig_pelicanos(df):
    fig = go.Figure()

    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=[None], y=[None], mode='markers',
        marker=dict(symbol="square", size=15, color="rgba(244,162,97,0.3)"),
        name='Fenómeno de El Niño', showlegend=True
    ))

    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=df['año'], y=df['cantidad_nidos_pelicanos'],
        mode='lines+markers', name='Nidos Activos',
        line=dict(color=C_TEAL, width=3, shape='spline'),
        marker=dict(size=8, color=C_DEEP, symbol='circle'),
        fill='tozeroy', fillcolor='rgba(42,157,143,0.15)',
        hovertemplate="<b>Año:</b> %{x}<br><b>Nidos:</b> %{y:,.0f}<extra></extra>"
    ))

    fig.add_annotation(x='2011', y=30400, text="<b>Máximo histórico</b>",
        showarrow=True, arrowhead=2, ax=0, ay=-40,
        font=dict(color=C_TEAL, size=12))

    # shapes_nino usa xref="x" numérico; pelícanos tiene eje categórico
    # → solo añadimos si el eje es compatible
    fig.update_layout(
        **_bg,
        title=dict(
            text="<b>Dinámica Reproductiva: Pelícano Pardo</b>"
                 "<br><span style='font-size:13px;color:#7ab4cc;'>"
                 "Impacto de la variabilidad oceánica en la anidación</span>",
            y=0.96, x=0.02, xanchor='left', yanchor='top'
        ),
        xaxis_title="Temporada (Año)",
        yaxis_title="Cantidad de Nidos",
        hovermode="x unified",
        legend=dict(orientation="h", y=1.05, yanchor="bottom", x=1, xanchor="right"),
        margin=dict(l=60, r=30, t=100, b=60),
        height=420
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=0, dtick=3, showgrid=False,
                     color="#7ab4cc", linecolor="rgba(93,214,240,0.2)")
    fig.update_yaxes(showgrid=True, gridcolor='rgba(93,214,240,0.12)',
                     tickformat=",", color="#7ab4cc")
    return fig


def crear_fig_pesca(df):
    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=df['año'], y=df['toneladas_pescadas'],
        mode='lines+markers', name='Producción (Ton)',
        line=dict(color='#C62828', width=3, shape='spline'),
        marker=dict(size=8, color='#B71C1C', symbol='diamond'),
        fill='tozeroy', fillcolor='rgba(198,40,40,0.1)',
        hovertemplate="<b>Año:</b> %{x}<br><b>Captura:</b> %{y:,.0f} ton<extra></extra>"
    ))

    max_ton  = df['toneladas_pescadas'].max()
    max_year = df.loc[df['toneladas_pescadas'].idxmax(), 'año']
    fig.add_annotation(x=max_year, y=max_ton, text="<b>Pico máximo histórico</b>",
        showarrow=True, arrowhead=2, ax=-40, ay=-30,
        font=dict(color="#E53935", size=12))

    fig.update_layout(
        **_bg,
        title=dict(text="<b>Extracción Pesquera en Baja California</b>",
                   y=0.96, x=0.02, xanchor='left', yanchor='top'),
        xaxis_title="Año", yaxis_title="Toneladas",
        hovermode="x unified",
        margin=dict(l=60, r=30, t=70, b=50),
        height=320
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=0, dtick=4, showgrid=False,
                     color="#7ab4cc", linecolor="rgba(93,214,240,0.2)")
    fig.update_yaxes(tickformat=",", showgrid=True,
                     gridcolor='rgba(93,214,240,0.12)', color="#7ab4cc")
    return fig


def crear_fig_embarcaciones(df):
    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=df['año'], y=df['total_embarcaciones'],
        mode='lines+markers', name='Total Embarcaciones',
        line=dict(color='#E65100', width=3, shape='spline'),
        marker=dict(size=8, color='#BF360C', symbol='diamond'),
        fill='tozeroy', fillcolor='rgba(230,81,0,0.1)',
        hovertemplate="<b>Año:</b> %{x}<br><b>Flota:</b> %{y:,.0f} barcos<extra></extra>"
    ))

    max_val  = df['total_embarcaciones'].max()
    max_year = df.loc[df['total_embarcaciones'].idxmax(), 'año']
    fig.add_annotation(x=max_year, y=max_val, text="<b>Flota máxima</b>",
        showarrow=True, arrowhead=2, ax=-40, ay=-30,
        font=dict(color="#E65100", size=12))

    fig.update_layout(
        **_bg,
        title=dict(text="<b>Crecimiento de la Flota Pesquera</b>",
                   y=0.96, x=0.02, xanchor='left', yanchor='top'),
        hovermode="x unified",
        margin=dict(l=60, r=30, t=70, b=50),
        height=320
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(title="Año", tickangle=0, dtick=4, showgrid=False,
                     color="#7ab4cc", linecolor="rgba(93,214,240,0.2)")
    fig.update_yaxes(title="Embarcaciones", tickformat=",", showgrid=True,
                     gridcolor='rgba(93,214,240,0.12)', color="#7ab4cc")
    return fig
```

# Ballenas

## Row {height="20%"}

::: {.valuebox icon="water" color="#0077B6"}
**20,000 km**

Ruta migratoria anual (Ártico — Baja California)
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="graph-up-arrow" color="#2A9D8F"}
**3,000+ individuos**

Máximo histórico registrado (2012)
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="exclamation-triangle" color="#C62828"}
**−67 %**

Desplome poblacional al mínimo histórico (2020)
:::

## Row {height="80%"}

```{python}
#| fig-responsive: true
display(crear_fig_ballenas(ballenas))
```

# Pelícanos

## Row {height="20%"}

::: {.valuebox icon="tsunami" color="#0077B6"}
**Indicador Costero**

Compite por alimento con flotas pesqueras
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="graph-up-arrow" color="#2A9D8F"}
**30,000+ nidos**

Máximo histórico registrado (2011)
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="exclamation-triangle" color="#C62828"}
**Cerca de 0**

Colapso reproductivo sin precedentes (2014–2015)
:::

## Row {height="80%"}

```{python}
#| fig-responsive: true
display(crear_fig_pelicanos(pelicanos))
```

# Producción y Flota

## Row {height="20%"}

::: {.valuebox icon="droplet" color="#0077B6"}
**La Paradoja**

A mayor extracción, menor biodiversidad
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="ship" color="#E65100"}
**~7,000 barcos**

Expansión estructural récord de la flota al 2024
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="basket" color="#C62828"}
**550,000+ ton**

Pico de producción en años de crisis biológica
:::

## Row {height="40%"}

```{python}
#| fig-responsive: true
display(crear_fig_pesca(produccion_pesquera))
```

## Row {height="40%"}

```{python}
#| fig-responsive: true
display(crear_fig_embarcaciones(embarcaciones))
```
